vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on gshadow File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow

triage_decision.reason: To properly set the permissions of /etc/gshadow, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0000 /etc/gshadow
triage_decision.estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; incorrect permissions on gshadow; potential privilege escalation
